overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates through crowded pedestrian walkways, descends stairs to a lower plaza, and explores an open waterfront area with massive holographic advertisements and towering megastructures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, following a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: overhead roof structure sheltering the walkway from rain
green and yellow neon signs for shops along the right side
massive futuristic skyscrapers visible in the foggy background
tall modern street lamps with linear fluorescent lighting
tall vertical digital advertisement screen showing colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-sheltered pedestrian walkway lined with neon-lit shops on the right. The wet pavement reflects the green and yellow neon signs while tall futuristic towers loom in the foggy background. Street lamps illuminate the path ahead as the character follows a pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairs to lower plaza level

events.description: character turns left and begins descending stairs to a lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking down wet stairs toward the lower plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella descending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing along the left side of the stairs
wet concrete stairs leading down to the lower level
open plaza space at the bottom of the stairs with scattered pedestrians
red glowing holographic debris or object on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and descends a flight of wet concrete stairs with glass railings, leaving the covered walkway behind. The neon shop signs recede into the distance as the character approaches a lower plaza area where red glowing debris sits on the pavement and pedestrians with umbrellas move about.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner with massive neon advertisements and mega tower base

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the massive mega tower structure looming overhead

agents.ego_description: walking past the neon-covered building then looking up at the mega tower structure above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the Feel the Beats building entrance

entered.detail: corner building covered in large pink and purple neon advertisements
circular pink neon signs with FEEL THE BEATS text on the building facade
massive dark megastructure tower extending high into the foggy sky
red aircraft warning lights arranged in rows on the tower facade
elevated pedestrian bridge with bright lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a building covered in massive pink circular neon advertisements for FEEL THE BEATS. The camera then tilts upward to reveal a colossal mega tower looming overhead with red warning lights blinking in the fog. An elevated walkway with bright lighting spans across the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and digital billboards

events.description: moving from the enclosed corner area into the open plaza space

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area with palm trees and scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: wide open paved area with scattered planters and benches
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
distant lights from the waterfront area visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the enclosed corner into a wide open plaza lined with palm trees. The massive neon building and mega tower fall behind as the character approaches the waterfront area, with distant lights visible through the rainy fog. Digital billboards stand prominently in the center of the plaza.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade toward distant neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: open walkway along the water's edge with reflective wet pavement
cluster of neon lights from distant buildings across the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the waterfront promenade, with palm trees now lining the right side. The open plaza falls behind as the character moves toward the distant neon lights of the city across the water. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a vast, rain-slicked waterfront plaza. It begins along a covered walkway where green and yellow neon signs reflect off wet pavement, following a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella beneath looming futuristic towers. As the character turns left and descends a flight of concrete stairs, the sheltered shops recede to reveal a lower plaza filled with red glowing debris and pedestrians. The scene then shifts past massive pink circular advertisements, with the camera tilting upward to capture a colossal mega tower blinking red lights in the fog before moving into a wide open area lined with palm trees and digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides along the waterfront promenade, leaving the towering structures behind as it moves toward the distant, shimmering city lights across the water.
